lede: Batch-export audio tracks as safe, shareable files.
sourceHelp: Reads WAV, AIFF, FLAC, MP3, M4A, or AAC files; exports to normalized_audio.
perTrackHelp: Best for pre-fader recordings. Adjust each track independently, then remix after import.
preserve: Normalize the group by its highest peak
preserveHelp: Apply one shared gain based on the loudest track, retaining the original balance.
convertHelp: Only lower and re-encode a track if its output exceeds the safety ceiling.
originalHelp: Keep each track’s recorded level; preview gain is controlled separately.
enforceSafety: Keep output below the safety ceiling
enforceSafetyHelp: When off, skip final peak verification and retries; the selected ceiling remains the initial target.
notice: Cleans NaN/Infinity, measures true peaks, then verifies the output. Float audio above 0 dBFS is safely reduced.
zip: 📦 Also create a ZIP share package
openFinderOnComplete: 📂 Open output folder in Finder when done
missingFfmpeg: FFmpeg is not available. Install dependencies first.
installConfirm: This will use Homebrew to install missing local dependencies. Continue?
uninstallConfirm: Only dependencies installed and recorded by this app will be removed. Continue?
trimHelp: Optional. Load waveforms to trim, audition, adjust preview volume, or choose tracks.
previewUnavailable: This file cannot be previewed in this browser.
previewLimiterHelp: Only affects playback, not exported files.
waveformsReady: Ready. Drag sliders, waveform markers, or enter times.
speedHelp: More tracks can finish one song sooner, but use more CPU and disk. This does not combine separate web jobs.
couldNotStartProgram: Could not start required program: {program}. It may have been moved or deleted.
missingFfmpegProbe: FFmpeg / FFprobe is not available. Install dependencies first.
noSupportedAudioFiles: No supported audio files were found in this folder.
trimEndMustFollowStart: Trim end must be after trim start{file}.
silentTrackConverted: {file} peak {peak} dBFS is below the empty-track threshold {threshold} dBFS: converted without normalization.
waitingForSourceLock: Another task is using this source folder; waiting for the output lock.
selectAtLeastOneTrack: Select at least one track to export.
originalLevelsNoSafety: Original-level mode: safety peak protection is skipped.
safetyCheckSkipped: Safety peak verification and retries are skipped; the selected ceiling remains {ceiling} dBFS.
sanitizingAndMeasuring: Sanitizing float samples and measuring peaks
reencodingForPeak: {file} encoded peak {peak} dBFS; re-encoding {attenuation} dB lower.
couldNotMeetCeiling: Could not bring {file} below the safety ceiling.
retryingForCeiling: Peak exceeded the safety ceiling; re-encoding from cleaned audio at a lower level.
couldNotMeetCeilingAfterRetries: Output still exceeds the safety ceiling after three verification passes.
selectSourceFolderPrompt: Select the folder containing audio tracks
splitStereo: Split stereo tracks into independent mono tracks
splitStereoReloadWaveform: Reload waveforms to apply the stereo split.
